assumption: MFAPI (https://api.mfapi.in) is used as the programmatic source for all mutual fund NAV data; AMFI remains the official disclosure source
reason: MFAPI provides machine-readable access to AMFI-disclosed daily NAV data; direct AMFI CSV parsing would add operational fragility without improving data quality for this educational use case
impact: MFAPI availability and historical completeness are outside project control; a stale or expired cache is used with an explicit CACHE_EXPIRED_USED_AFTER_FETCH_FAILURE label if a live fetch fails; AMFI disclosures take precedence for any official regulatory or investment-decision context

assumption: yfinance price-index levels are used as last-resort proxies when official NSE/Nifty Indices TRI endpoints are unavailable; these series are labelled source_quality = PRICE_INDEX_PROXY_NOT_TRI and never silently presented as TRI
reason: No free programmatic Total Returns Index source with reliable uptime exists for all required benchmarks; the price-index proxy preserves analytical continuity with explicit disclosure rather than failing silently and withholding all benchmark-relative analytics
impact: Any metric computed against a PRICE_INDEX_PROXY_NOT_TRI series understates the true TRI return because dividends are excluded; beta / tracking error / information ratio / upside and downside capture ratios for affected fund-benchmark pairs inherit this understatement and must be read accordingly

assumption: HYBRID_65_35 is internally synthesized as 65% NIFTY50_TRI daily return + 35% flat 6% annualized cash accrual (0.06 / 252 per trading day); it is labelled source = INTERNAL_SYNTHETIC_BENCHMARK and source_quality = DISCLOSED_APPROXIMATION
reason: No official published benchmark exists for HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund; the 65/35 static equity/debt split approximates the fund's strategic allocation and is the simplest transparent proxy for educational diagnostic purposes
impact: The 35% sleeve uses a static 6% annual cash proxy rather than actual debt index or arbitrage returns; the real fund's dynamic tactical allocation, hedging, and arbitrage positions are not captured; all benchmark-relative metrics for HDFC Balanced Advantage must be read with this structural simplification in mind

assumption: Deterministic scenario shocks (e.g. Broad Equity Correction: UTI Nifty 50 Index −15%) are fixed illustrative assumptions only; they are not model-derived estimates and do not carry an implied probability or confidence interval
reason: No macro or volatility model is maintained in this project; fixed point shocks are the most transparent way to explore portfolio stress without implying quantitative forecast precision or misleading users about the likelihood of each scenario
impact: Actual losses in any scenario could differ materially from the modeled shocks in both magnitude and direction; figures must not be used as expected-loss measures or as the basis for portfolio construction or risk-limit decisions

assumption: The five funds (UTI Nifty 50 Index / ICICI Bluechip / Parag Parikh Flexi Cap / HDFC Balanced Advantage / Nippon India Small Cap) are selected as category-proxy analytical sleeves; they are not a recommendation set and are not a representative sample of the Indian mutual fund universe
reason: Category-proxy selection provides analytical contrast across distinct style and risk-tier categories (passive large cap / active large cap / flexi cap / hybrid-BAF / small cap); five funds allow meaningful portfolio-level attribution and suitability diagnostics without bloating the dataset for a proof-of-work demonstration
impact: Findings and diagnostics are specific to these five funds over the 2021-present period and are not generalizable to the broader mutual fund universe; no inference about other funds or AMCs should be drawn; this is a fixed demonstration corpus and not a screened or optimized recommendation

assumption: All benchmark-relative metrics (beta / tracking error / information ratio / upside and downside capture) are trailing historical diagnostics computed over the 2021-present period; they are not official performance attribution and are not forward-looking
reason: Consistent with the project's educational proof-of-work positioning; any metric computed against a price-index proxy or internally synthesized benchmark carries additional source-quality caveats that are disclosed at point of use via the source_quality field in data_quality_report.csv
impact: Results must not be used for fund selection / portfolio construction / or regulatory compliance; any interpretation must be paired with the source_quality disclosure for the relevant benchmark; the educational-diagnostics framing applies to every page in the app
